issues.title: Incorrect revenue calculation
issues.problem: The query is not filtering transactions by 'COMPLETED' status as per the business rule.

issues.title: Lack of comments
issues.problem: The query lacks comments explaining its purpose and logic.
issues.fix:
-- Query to find top spenders by customer tier for dashboard integration
SELECT c.tier, email, SUM(amount) AS total_spend
FROM dim_customer c
JOIN fact_transactions t ON c.customer_id = t.customer_id
WHERE status = 'COMPLETED'
GROUP BY c.tier, email
HAVING total_spend > 5000;

issues.title: Missing join with dim_merchant
issues.problem: The query should join with dim_merchant to get merchant names instead of showing merchant IDs.
issues.fix:
-- Query to find top spenders by customer tier for dashboard integration
SELECT c.tier, c.email, SUM(t.amount) AS total_spend
FROM dim_customer c
JOIN fact_transactions t ON c.customer_id = t.customer_id
JOIN dim_merchant m ON t.merchant_id = m.merchant_id
WHERE t.status = 'COMPLETED'
GROUP BY c.tier, c.email
HAVING total_spend > 5000;

review.corrected_sql:
-- Query to find top spenders by customer tier for dashboard integration
SELECT c.tier, c.email, SUM(t.amount) AS total_spend
FROM dim_customer c
JOIN fact_transactions t ON c.customer_id = t.customer_id
JOIN dim_merchant m ON t.merchant_id = m.merchant_id
WHERE t.status = 'COMPLETED'
GROUP BY c.tier, c.email
HAVING total_spend > 5000;
review.summary: The query had a critical correctness issue with the status filter and lacked comments and a join with dim_merchant for readability.
